goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'afghan' food and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should be in the 'cheap' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'asian oriental' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the restaurant' and should be in the type of 'mutliple sports'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of theatre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve afghan food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the cheap price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves asian oriental food
Make sure you get phone number and postcode
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the restaurant and should be in the type of mutliple sports
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of theatre
Make sure you get address and postcode
